title: Biggest Lesson — partner-vision micro-creed, May 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • A post-Sam-breakup micro-creed (May 8 2024 — ~10 days after the 2024 04 27 sam breakup script script). Three rules:
    1. Play strategic, but express how you feel.
    2. The one will be natural — leave it all on the table. "Tell her she's wanted, see your unborn children in her eyes, feel like you've won the lottery and don't understand what you've done to deserve her and she's the one."
    3. Energy > actions.
  • The "see your unborn children in her eyes" line is the single sharpest articulation of Yahir's partner-criterion in the corpus — pairs with the lineage as fate concept and the 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future legacy frame.

Key quote

"Tell her she's wanted, see your unborn children in her eyes, feel like you've won the lottery and don't understand what you've done to deserve her and she's the one."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The criterion Yahir later evaluates emily against in 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment (where he documents the misalignment side) — this is the criterion sheet, that's the report card.
  • Energy > actions is the operating philosophy behind the magnetic aura concept and the 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want "raw magnetic intoxicating aura" line.
  • The Sam→criterion→Emily arc spans:
    • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script (April)
    • 2024-05-08-biggest-lesson (May, this note — criterion locked in)
    • 2024 07 06 dont want to exactly admit it (July, still thinking about Sam)
    • 2025 09 25 emily trails words like sam (Sep 2025, comparing Emily to Sam)
    • 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment (Mar 2026, formal misalignment audit)

Open questions

  • Did Yahir ever apply the "unborn children in her eyes" test to Emily? Or anyone before her?
  • "Strategic but express how you feel" — what does "strategic" mean in his frame?

Wikilinks
